title: User Management
description: Mengelola user, privilege, dan keamanan di MySQL.

commands.name: CREATE USER
commands.title: Membuat User
commands.description: Membuat akun user baru di MySQL.
commands.notes: Selalu gunakan password yang kuat. Batasi host access sesuai kebutuhan.

commands.name: GRANT
commands.title: Memberikan Privilege

options.description: Bisa memberikan privilege ke user lain

commands.notes: Jalankan FLUSH PRIVILEGES setelah mengubah privilege.

commands.name: REVOKE
commands.title: Mencabut Privilege

commands.name: SHOW GRANTS
commands.title: Tampilkan Privilege

commands.name: DROP USER
commands.title: Menghapus User
commands.examples:
DROP USER 'old_user'@'localhost';
DROP USER IF EXISTS 'test_user'@'%';

commands.name: ALTER USER
commands.title: Mengubah User
